titleStmt.title: SII 29.55: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 55. (A.R. No. B. 530 of 1961-62.) BĀGALWĀḌ, MANVI TALUK, RAICHUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Two pieces of a stone lying near the temple of Banagarda Basavaṇṇa.

It records a grant of land excluding the taxes mūligardeṟe and uṁbaḷi to the prabhus and gāvuṇḍas of Bammaḻahāṉa by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Ayyaṇādēva of the Haihaya lineage, a feudatory of the king Chālukya Vīkramāditya VI. Ayyaṇadēva is described as the servant of the queen Malayamatidēvi.
It is dated in Chālukya Vikrama year 20, Yuva, Pushya śu. 13. Thursday. It corresponds to 1095 A.D., December 12, Wednesday, f.d.t. 05.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastyanēka bhaṁgura taraṁga saṁghauta vīcicchāya lavaṇābdavaḷaya vaḷayta
vēḷāvana gaṁga pāriyātra tanmadhya dēśādhīśvaraṁ māhiṣmati puravarādhīśvaraṁ sahasra
bāhu pratāpaṁ bhūpa diḷīpana hihaya vaṁśōdbhavanamarēṁdra vibhavaṁ mūlapaṟe ghōṣaṇaṁ paranṛpabhīṣaṇaṁ raṇa
raṁgavīṟaṁ śrī manmalayamatidēviyaraṁkakāṟaṁ śrī matṛ(tri)bhuvanamalladēva pādāravinda
śaṭṭaraṇanayyaṇābharaṇaṁ nāmādi samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī manmahāma
ṇḍaḷēśvaranayyaṇādēvaru sukhasaṁkathā vinōdadiṁda rājyaṁgeyyutta mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁ saluttamire
duṣṭa nigraha śiṣṭapratipāḷaneyammāḍi śrīmaccāḷukya vikrama varṣada 20 neya yūkhaIt is a mistake for yuva.
saṁvatsarada pauṣya śudda 13 bṛhaspativāradaṁdu bammaḻahāṟa prabhugāvuṇḍagaḷge mūligedeṟaṁ
yumanuṇbaḷakeṟeymu biṭṭu sarvvabādhā parihāraṁ mmāḍi dhārāpūrvakavāgi ya
lliya voladalkoṭṭa guḍḍe mānyaṁ mattar 75 Ī(i)nti dharmmamā tappade prati
pāḷisuvudakke śrīmatṛbhuvanamalladēvarāṇe hiriyarane
yarāṇe Idanārānu Aḷidargge prayāgayalkavileyaṁ brāhmaṇaraḷida dōśaṁ sā
rggaṁ . svadattāṁ paradattaṁ vāyō harēti vasuṁdara śaṣṭivarṣasaha
śrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 29.55 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
